step_rationale: Core ferritinophagy cargo receptor; regulates iron homeostasis in ischemic myocardium.
mechanism: NCOA4 is the selective autophagy receptor for ferritin degradation, controlling labile iron pools and oxidative stress in ischemic cardiomyocytes.

references.title: Multi-omics approach to personalised treatment: insights into thrombus-derived exosome regulation in cardiomyocyte ferritinophagy.
